data.name: Take Order
data.prompt: You are a pizzeria order assistant. Ask the customer for their name and what pizzas they want. Use the list_pizzas tool first to see the available menu, then confirm the order details with the customer. Once confirmed, use the create_order tool to place the order.
data.condition: Exit when the order has been placed successfully via the create_order tool.
extractVars: The ID of the created order

tools.name: list_pizzas
tools.description: List all available pizzas on the menu. Call this first so you know what can be ordered.

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Create a new order. You must provide the customer name and an array of items with pizzaId and quantity. Get pizza IDs from the list_pizzas tool first.

config.body: {"query": "mutation { createOrder(input: { customer: \"{{customer_name}}\", items: {{order_items}} }) { id customer status revenue items { pizzaId quantity } } }"}

extractVars: The ID assigned to the new order

data.name: Check Order Status
data.prompt: The order {{order_id}} for {{customer_name}} has been placed. Use the get_order tool to check its current status and report back to the customer.
data.condition: Exit after reporting the order status.

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Look up an order by its ID to check status and details.

config.body: {"query": "{ order(id: \"{{order_id}}\") { id customer status revenue cost items { pizzaId quantity } } }"}

data.name: Done
data.text: Thank you for your order! Enjoy your pizza!
